author: lOrm
content: Fixed. session::atomic_write now stages under <file>.<pid>.<uuid>.tmp instead of <file>.tmp. Two concurrent persist_session calls on the same session_id no longer collide on the staging path. On rename failure the staging file is best-effort unlinked so we don't leak debris. list_sessions already filters on .json extension so the .tmp staging files are not mistaken for sessions.
